{{Quote|First Steward Bearsh and the other Geroons came a long way to pay you honor for saving them from slavery to the Vagaari all those years ago. I know they would very much like to be present at our discussions.|[[Ambassador/Legends|Ambassador]] [[Dean Jinzler]], to [[Jorad Pressor]]|<ref name="SQ" />}}
'''First Steward''' was a title used by the [[Geroon Remnant]], a secret [[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]] military unit.<ref name="SQ" /> In [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' to [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]].</ref> the [[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]] [[Bearsh]] held the title until he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and former [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker]].<ref name="SQ" />

==Behind the scenes==
A First Steward appeared in [[Timothy Zahn]]'s [[2004]] novel ''[[Survivor's Quest]]''.<ref name="SQ" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' {{Ab|Survivor's Quest (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
